summary: Live PR inventory shard only; no shared canonical was selected or invented. Low-signal and instant close actions are disabled by the job, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked, and no security-sensitive refs were detected. Each open listed PR needs ordinary author/maintainer follow-up rather than Clownfish mutation.

actions.reason: Focused draft bug fix with failed behavior proof and unresolved technical validation; job requires human for focused_bug_fix and technical_correctness_judgment.
Potentially useful focused feature/fix, but it has a maintainer rebase request, failed proof, and unresolved review-bot correctness findings; close/fix/merge are not allowed in this job.
Maintainer-owned active draft with broad feature scope; inventory automation should leave the owner-driven review path to humans.
Maintainer-owned draft with sufficient proof but explicit maintainer-review gate; job requires human for maintainer_signal and blocks merge.
Maintainer-owned draft with active author-followup status and unresolved review/comment feedback; job requires human for maintainer_signal and active_author_followup.

needs_human: #67011: focused draft bug fix needs real behavior proof and maintainer correctness judgment before any merge or replacement decision.
